name: Yuki Tanaka
title: Lead Software Engineer / Engineering Manager
bio: Engineering manager with 12 years of experience across backend engineering and technical leadership. Currently managing a team of 9 engineers at a Tokyo-based SaaS company building supply chain software.

details: Manages two squads (platform and integrations) across Japan and remote hires
Drove rewrite of core import/export pipeline from Rails monolith to Go microservices, improving throughput 8x
Introduced structured engineering levels and a technical career ladder
Runs bi-weekly 1:1s, quarterly performance reviews, and hiring (screened 80+ candidates)
Backend for the seller tools and logistics tracking surfaces (Go, gRPC, Spanner)
On-call rotation for critical payment and shipping services
Mentored 4 junior engineers who have since reached senior level
Java Spring Boot services for the marketplace search and ranking team
Led integration of Elasticsearch for product catalogue search
